title: oberonia rufilabris
intro: Oberonia rufilabris is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Oberonia rufilabris include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oberonia rufilabris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and provide relief from fever and other related symptoms. Oberonia rufilabris is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
